blocking_details.www.carrefour.ma: DNS resolution failure — hostname does not resolve from the scraping environment (socket.gaierror: No address associated with hostname). Confirmed that general internet connectivity is intact (google.com resolves normally). This is geo-DNS or network-level blocking.
blocking_details.carrefour.ma (bare domain): Resolves to Cloudflare IP 104.18.2.39 but returns 'Attention Required! | Cloudflare — Sorry, you have been blocked' on every path: /, /robots.txt, /sitemap.xml, /fr/c/epicerie, /fr/c/boissons, /fr/c/produits-laitiers, /fr/c/fruits-legumes, /fr/c/animalerie. Both MatechaBot and browser User-Agent strings are blocked. Cloudflare bot-detection challenge is triggered before any HTML catalog content is served.
blocking_details.robots.txt: Returns HTTP 403 Forbidden — compliance verification is impossible; crawling cannot proceed in good faith.
blocking_details.google_cache: Google cache redirect does not expose cached product HTML; returns search-error stub.
blocking_details.web_archive_org: web.archive.org fetching is blocked in this environment.
blocking_details.common_crawl_index: index.commoncrawl.org returns HTTP 503 for both CC-MAIN-2025-18 and CC-MAIN-2024-51 queries.
blocking_details.summary: The site is fully protected by Cloudflare's bot-management layer. No HTML product data was returned on any attempted URL or via any cache/archive alternative. Robots.txt itself returns 403, making compliance verification impossible. Scraping cannot proceed without browser automation (Playwright/Puppeteer with stealth + proxy) that the current tool does not support.

errors_detail.error: DNS NXDOMAIN — No address associated with hostname
Google cache redirect — no product HTML returned

recommended_next_steps: Run the scraper from a Moroccan residential proxy (e.g. Bright Data, Oxylabs) where www.carrefour.ma DNS resolves and Cloudflare does not challenge.

Use Playwright with playwright-extra + puppeteer-stealth plugin to pass the Cloudflare JS challenge and cookie requirement, then extract product JSON from the rendered DOM or intercept XHR/fetch network calls to the catalog API.
Contact Carrefour Maroc's digital team for an official product data feed or API partnership (data@carrefour.ma or via the partner portal).
Check if Carrefour Maroc publishes a Google Merchant Center feed at /feed.xml, /feed/google, or /sitemap_products.xml — these are sometimes unprotected.
Explore Common Crawl WARC archives (https://commoncrawl.org) for historical Carrefour Maroc snapshots once the Common Crawl index server recovers from 503 errors.
